fields.title: Finish async filesystem migration for agents-menu settings and autoresearch UI paths
fields.description: Audit item F2 remains partial. agents-menu/state no longer does synchronous Ralph loop ownership scans during UI/tool refreshes because ownership is preloaded asynchronously into cache, but settings reads/writes there are still sync and src/autoresearch/index.ts still performs several sync filesystem scans/reads/writes in UI/event-handler paths. Move the remaining settings I/O and autoresearch runtime file access onto async Effect/Promise boundaries without changing current behavior, then rerun extensions/tau gate.
